rules: This branch manages Octopus_OS root AGENTS/README, container-root AGENTS/README, and Mother_Doc docs AGENTS/README together.
scan must inspect product-side AGENTS.md plus README.md state without rewriting ordinary content.
collect must consume scan_report.json and copy current AGENTS.md plus README.md files back into the skill-side registry.
push must regenerate root/container AGENTS.md plus README.md, refresh Mother_Doc docs AGENTS.md navigation, and sync the registry again.
This branch is still inside mother_doc stage and must not perform implementation or evidence actions.
